author: yesbhautik
name: DominationV1: 11L Int6 + Per-dim SmearGate + RoPE50K + SWA50 + OrthoInit
blurb: 11-layer MLP-3x with per-dim SmearGate, BigramHash (2048x128), int6 per-row quantization for MLP+attention, int8 for embedding, zstd-22, RoPE base 50K, Muon WD=0.04, dense SWA (every 50 steps, ~30 checkpoints), sliding window eval stride=64.
